title: siphoneugena densiflora var. densiflora
intro: Siphoneugena densiflora var. densiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as the 'Ilang-ilang' or 'Maypochay'. It is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Siphoneugena densiflora var. densiflora include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
